results.title: How I Used CREAO's Super Agent to Start Automating My Work
results.snippet:
The bar to get started is low, you don't need to code or have a technical background - just start a conversation. When you're done you won't just have something that does one thing, you'll have something that can carry the load. All you have to do is ask.

Ready to start crafting your Super Agent employee? Start for free at creao.ai , or open up the builder and watch your first agent come to life!

Lucera Cox is the co-founder and CTO of Waji, She’s been building apps with and without AI for nearly seven years, and more recently agents with CREAO!

## Your AI Super Agent. [...] ## Step 3: Tell the Super Agent What You Want to Automate

Here's where CREAO’s Super Agent differs from every other AI tool I've used: you don't need to nail a perfect prompt before you start. I had a rough idea of what I wanted and I just... said it. In plain language. The Super Agent asked me clarifying questions, I answered them, and we shaped the process together.

I did use Claude to help me think through my constraints beforehand - what I wanted it to do, what I explicitly didn't want, what good output looked like. But that was for my own clarity, not because the tool required it. You could just as easily start talking and let the conversation get you there. [...] How to find your use case: Think about what genuinely eats your time, not what sounds impressive. Then check CREAO's integrations available in your CREAO builder workspace and see what tools you already use that are connected. If there's overlap between "time I'm losing" and "tools that are connected," you have a use case. The “Pre-Installed” and “Skills” tabs are also great places to unlock ideas about what your agent could do!

## Step 2: Define the Simplest Version That Would Actually Be Useful

Here's where a lot of people go wrong with AI tools. They try to build the final version on day one. I wanted to build an MVP agent app : something that worked, proved the concept, and that I could continue to iterate on.

My parameters were straightforward. I wanted an agent that:

AI Super Agent

# Built-in AI Super Agent

Your smart assistant that executes tasks and turns successful sessions into reusable Agent Apps

## ​ What is Super Agent?

The built-in AI Super Agent is your smart assistant inside the workspace. It understands your context, executes tasks using Skills and Connectors, and delivers results — all through plain language. Just describe what you need, and the Super Agent handles the rest.

## ​ Before you start

You must select a workspace before using Super Agent.

## ​ The chat bar

The Super Agent chat bar sits at the bottom of your workspace. It includes: [...] CREAO Documentation home pagelight logodark logo

# Built-in AI Super Agent [...] ### ​ Tool calling

During execution, the Super Agent automatically selects the right tools for each step of your task. You can watch its progress in real time as it:

 Searches the web
 Calls MCP integrations
 Reads and writes files
 Generates artifacts

## ​ Using the Super Agent

### ​ Start a conversation

Click the chat bar and describe what you need. Be specific about the task, inputs, and expected output. 

### ​ Review results

The Super Agent delivers results directly in the chat with structured output, sources, and follow-up suggestions. 

### ​ Turn it into an Agent App

When a session produces great results, you can save it as a reusable Agent App — either from the chat toolbar or from the completion card.

## Create an Agent App

answer: Creao AI offers an AI Super Agent for automating tasks, creating content, and managing workflows. It provides a no-code platform to build and run agent apps. Pricing starts free with options to upgrade for more features.
